case_title: MICHAEL VINCENT MARTAK VS. QUANTUM4D, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTAK, MICHAEL VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT QUANTUM4D, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
